raw.subject: Your Lawton page caught my eye, 365 Mobile Tire Service
raw.body:
Hi,

I've been following your food truck events, and I'm impressed by how well you connect with the Ft. Sill community. Your Jerk Chicken at the Exchange ( PX ) sounds like a hit!

But I noticed you don't have your own website yet, which might be leaving potential customers like emergency responders, truckers, or locals seeking roadside assistance unable to find you online.

I sketched a simple page idea from what you post on Facebook, featuring an emergency call CTA, a list of services, a map of your service area, and a sticky phone bar for easy contact. Take a look:

https://damianbasilio.github.io/f/preview/365-mobile-tire-service-lawton/

I'd love to discuss how a simple website can help your business grow. For local businesses like yours, I offer a straightforward project with a flat fee.

Reply or give me a quick call to get started.
